FQA-001.description: Manual attribute extraction anti-pattern in HeaderMain.php
FQA-001.verification: Verified: HeaderMain.php lines 22-32 now use null coalescing on auto-extracted variables ($logoId = $logoId ?? null). Manual $attributes['key'] pattern completely removed. @var docblock added (lines 5-19).

FQA-002.verification: Verified: Complete @var docblock present (lines 5-19) listing all 9 camelCase attribute variables with types.

FQA-003.verification: Verified: Desktop search input (line 103) now has 'normal-case placeholder:uppercase' matching mobile search (line 177). Critical UX bug fixed - user input will no longer be forced to uppercase.

FQA-004.verification: Verified: Manual extraction removed (previously lines 10-12). Now uses null coalescing on auto-extracted variables (lines 16-18). @var docblock added (lines 5-12).

FQA-005.verification: Verified: Manual extraction removed (previously line 10). Now uses null coalescing (line 14). @var docblock added (lines 5-10).

FQA-006.verification: Verified: @var docblock present with all 3 camelCase variables documented.

FQA-007.verification: Verified: Variable reassignments removed (previously lines 14-15). Variables $title and $description now used directly with null coalescing (lines 12-13). Clean @var docblock (lines 5-8).

FQA-008.verification: Pre-existing issue in unrelated block. Not in scope for Header fixes.

FQA-009.verification: Pre-existing issue in unrelated block. Not in scope for Header fixes.

FQA-010.verification: Pre-existing warnings across entire theme. Not introduced by Header changes.

FQA-011.verification: Pre-existing build warnings. Not related to Header changes.

build.notes: Build passes with pre-existing asset size warnings (js/editor.js 346 KiB). No errors introduced by fixes.

lint.notes: No Header-related lint errors. Pre-existing errors in Hero and TestimonialsCarousel remain (out of scope).

registration.notes: Block registration validation passed. All schema, naming, file references, and attributes correct.

attributes.notes: All attributes properly used. No unused attributes detected.

edgeCases.notes: Test page includes comprehensive edge case coverage with 9 header instances.

interactiveBehavior.notes: Keyboard navigation works correctly. Focus outlines visible. Fixed header behavior correct.

accessibility.notes: Focus-visible outline styles present on all interactive elements. ARIA attributes correct.

markupDuplication.notes: No unnecessary markup duplication. Intentional duplicates properly scoped (desktop/mobile).

tsxPhpSync.notes: TSX/PHP sync validation PASSED with 0 issues. All manual attribute extraction removed. All @var docblocks present. Desktop and mobile search inputs have identical classes in PHP and TSX.

innerBlocks.notes: Inner blocks render correctly. Test page shows proper nesting with various configurations.

specCompliance.notes: All 9 changes from planning spec implemented and verified.

fixesVerified.description: Desktop search input uppercase bug fixed
fixesVerified.before: Desktop search had 'uppercase' class, forcing all user input to uppercase
fixesVerified.after: Desktop search now has 'normal-case placeholder:uppercase' - only placeholder is uppercase, user input remains normal case
fixesVerified.verification: Inspected HeaderMain.php line 103: class includes 'normal-case placeholder:uppercase'. Matches mobile search (line 177). Both desktop and mobile search inputs found on all 9 header instances via page audit.
fixesVerified.impact: Critical UX bug resolved. Users can now type lowercase letters in desktop search.

fixesVerified.description: Manual attribute extraction anti-pattern removed from HeaderMain.php
fixesVerified.after: Uses null coalescing on auto-extracted variables: $logoId = $logoId ?? null
fixesVerified.verification: Inspected HeaderMain.php lines 22-32. No $attributes['key'] pattern found. All variables use null coalescing on auto-extracted values.
fixesVerified.impact: Code now follows project conventions. Automatic extraction via inc/helpers/blocks.php is properly utilized.

fixesVerified.after: Complete @var docblock with all 9 camelCase attribute variables and types
fixesVerified.verification: Inspected HeaderMain.php lines 5-19. @var docblock present with: $logoId (int|null), $sepLink (array), $searchLink (array), $mobileCtaText (string), $mobileCtaLink (array), $fixedOnScrollDesktop (bool), $hideOnScrollDownDesktop (bool), $fixedOnScrollMobile (bool), $hideOnScrollDownMobile (bool), $anchor (string).
fixesVerified.impact: Prevents PHP_CodeSniffer warnings about camelCase usage.

fixesVerified.description: Manual attribute extraction removed from HeaderMainItem.php
fixesVerified.after: Null coalescing on auto-extracted variables with @var docblock
fixesVerified.verification: Inspected HeaderMainItem.php. Manual extraction removed (previously lines 10-12). Lines 16-18 use null coalescing. @var docblock present (lines 5-12).

fixesVerified.description: Manual attribute extraction removed from HeaderMainSubItem.php
fixesVerified.after: Null coalescing on auto-extracted variable with @var docblock
fixesVerified.verification: Inspected HeaderMainSubItem.php. Manual extraction removed (previously line 10). Line 14 uses null coalescing. @var docblock present (lines 5-10).

fixesVerified.description: Manual variable reassignments removed from DemoContainer.php
fixesVerified.after: Variables used directly with null coalescing
fixesVerified.verification: Inspected DemoContainer.php. Reassignments removed. Lines 12-13 set defaults via null coalescing. Variables used directly throughout template (lines 25, 30, 34, 41).

productionReadiness.notes: All 7 major Header-related issues have been resolved. The 4 remaining issues are pre-existing minor issues in unrelated blocks that do not block production deployment of the Header block.

output.rerunSummary: All 7 major and minor Header-related issues from the initial QA run have been successfully resolved. The critical desktop search uppercase bug is fixed (FQA-003). All manual attribute extraction anti-patterns removed from 4 files (FQA-001, FQA-004, FQA-005, FQA-007). All @var docblocks added for camelCase variables (FQA-002, FQA-006). TSX/PHP sync validation passes with 0 issues. Build passes. Header block is production-ready.
